message:
feat(test): add document type serde roundtrip tests to proptest_indexing

Add 6 property-based tests for core search document types:
- ScrollbackLine, IndexableDocument, IndexedDocument serde roundtrips
- IndexableDocument::text constructor metadata invariant
- ScrollbackLine::new default field invariant
- IndexedDocument field preservation through serde

Total: 55 property-based tests (was 49).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
